title: IF THEN ELSEIF always evaluates the first test as true
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, flag BOOLEAN, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, flag, description) VALUES (1, TRUE, 'First entry'), (2, FALSE, 'Second entry'), (3, NULL, 'Third entry');
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION evaluate_flag(b BOOLEAN) RETURNS VARCHAR(255) AS BEGIN IF b THEN RETURN 'true';
key_bug_features: IF THEN ELSEIF evaluates first condition as true always
